extension.summary: Scrape, cache and auto-refresh library ratings, episodes and IMDb Top 250 rank
Scrape, cache, dan refresh otomatis rating seluruh library, episode, serta ranking IMDb Top 250
extension.description: Scans Kodi movies, TV shows and individual episodes. Stores normalized and raw rating data from the Kodi library, MDBList, TMDb and OMDb in an independent cache. Stores rating cache independently, refreshes expired items automatically in the background, publishes cached values for Arctic Fuse 3, preloads the next Arctic Mirage slide, and safely updates Kodi movie Top 250 rank through JSON-RPC. Manual full-library scans are handed to the service and shown as a non-blocking background progress notification. Does not write to TMDbHelper private cache. Version 1.3.16 makes the random check a true live internet/provider test: cached rating rows and local Kodi ratings are ignored; cache is used only for IDs.

Memindai film, serial, dan setiap episode di library Kodi. Menyimpan data rating terstandardisasi dan data mentah dari library Kodi, MDBList, TMDb, dan OMDb dalam cache terpisah. Menyimpan cache rating secara terpisah, memperbarui item kedaluwarsa secara otomatis di latar belakang, menyajikan cache untuk Arctic Fuse 3, melakukan preload slide Arctic Mirage berikutnya, serta memperbarui ranking Top 250 film melalui JSON-RPC. Pemindaian manual seluruh library diserahkan ke service dan ditampilkan sebagai notifikasi progres latar belakang yang tidak mengunci antarmuka. Tidak menulis ke cache internal TMDbHelper. Versi 1.3.16 membuat cek random benar-benar mengetes internet/provider langsung: rating cache dan rating lokal Kodi diabaikan; cache hanya dipakai untuk ID.
